create.description: Create a new post on Google Business Profile

delete.description: Delete a reply to a review

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific review on Google Business Profile

location.description: The specific location or business associated with the account

postType.description: The type of post to create (standard, event, offer, or alert)

summary.description: The main text of the post

title.description: E.g. 20% off in store or online.

startDateTime.description: The start date and time of the event

endDateTime.description: The end date and time of the event

startDate.description: The start date of the offer

endDate.description: The end date of the offer

COVID_19.description: This alert is related to the 2019 Coronavirus Disease pandemic

languageCode.description: The language code of the post content. More info.

callToActionType.description: The type of call to action

BOOK.description: This post wants a user to book an appointment/table/etc

CALL.description: This post wants a user to call the business

LEARN_MORE.description: This post wants a user to learn more (at their website)

ORDER.description: This post wants a user to order something

SHOP.description: This post wants a user to browse a product catalog

SIGN_UP.description: This post wants a user to register/sign up/join something

GET_OFFER.description: Deprecated. Use OFFER in LocalPostTopicType to create a post with offer content.

url.description: The URL that users are sent to when clicking through the promotion

couponCode.description: The coupon code for the offer

termsConditions.description: The terms and conditions of the offer

summary.description: The main text of the post

startDateTime.description: The start date and time of the event

endDateTime.description: The end date and time of the event

title.description: E.g. 20% off in store or online.

startDate.description: The start date of the offer

endDate.description: The end date of the offer

post.description: Select the post to retrieve its details

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

notice.displayName: Make sure that the updated options are supported by the post type. More info.

review.description: Select the review to retrieve its details

reply.description: The body of the reply (up to 4096 characters)

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

allowUnauthorizedCerts.description: Whether to accept the response even if SSL certificate validation is not possible

proxy.description: HTTP proxy to use. If authentication is required it can be defined as follow: http://username:password@myproxy:3128

timeout.description: Time in ms to wait for the server to send response headers (and start the response body) before aborting the request
